description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-code-snippet

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-code-snippet/`

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Syntax colors, background, border, font-family. Dark mode (critical for code).
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Proper code semantics (pre/code). Copy button labeling. Keyboard accessible copy.
3. **Functionality** — Single-line/multi-line. Copy to clipboard. Language display. Line numbers. Overflow scrolling.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. Monospace font. Horizontal scroll. CSS Parts.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All properties documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Copy functionality. Variants.
8. **Storybook** — Single/multi-line. Different content lengths. Copy demo.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Code filter output. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. No syntax highlighting library dependency.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-code-snippet
